metadata.description: EntraPass Scanner - App Registration with PKCE + Graph delegated permissions
metadata.author: EntraPass

metadata.description: Base name for the app registration
SPA redirect URI (your EntraPass portal URL)
Your Microsoft Entra ID tenant ID

instructions.value:
[concat('Deployment created the scaffolding for: ', variables('displayName'), '.

To create the App Registration:

Option 1 - Azure Portal:
1. Go to Azure Portal > App Registrations > New Registration
2. Name: ', variables('displayName'), '
3. Accounts: Only this organizational directory
4. Redirect URI: SPA -> ', parameters('redirectUri'), '
5. Click Register
6. API Permissions > Add > Microsoft Graph > Delegated permissions
7. Add: User.Read, User.Read.All, Device.Read.All, Policy.Read.All, Application.Read.All, AuditLog.Read.All, Organization.Read.All
8. Grant admin consent

Option 2 - PowerShell (run in Cloud Shell):
Connect-MgGraph -Scopes Application.ReadWrite.All
$app = New-MgApplication -DisplayName "', variables('displayName'), '" -SignInAudience AzureADMyOrg -Spa @{RedirectUris=@("', parameters('redirectUri'), '")}
$requiredAccess = @(
  @{ResourceAppId="00000003-0000-0000-c000-000000000000"; ResourceAccess=@( @{Id="e1fe6dd8-ba31-4d61-89e7-88639da4683d"; Type="Scope"},@{Id="a154be20-db9c-4678-8ab7-66f6cc099a59"; Type="Scope"},@{Id="951183d1-1a61-466f-a6d1-1fde911bfd95"; Type="Scope"},@{Id="572fea84-0151-49b2-9301-11cb16974376"; Type="Scope"},@{Id="c79f8feb-a9db-4090-85f9-90d820caa0eb"; Type="Scope"},@{Id="e4c9e354-4dc5-45b8-9e7c-e1393b0b1a20"; Type="Scope"},@{Id="4908d5b9-3fb2-4b1e-9336-1888b7937185"; Type="Scope"} )}
)
Update-MgApplication -ApplicationId $app.Id -RequiredResourceAccess $requiredAccess
Write-Host "Client ID: $($app.AppId)"')]
